intro: Codonoboea crocea is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the golden codonboea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The bioactive constituents of Codonoboea crocea include iridoid glycosides, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities.
